_publications._publicationTitle: RABL6A Regulates Schwann Cell Senescence in an RB1-Dependent Manner.

_contextSnippet: RB1 loss alone had no effect on proliferation, whereas it partially rescued the anti-proliferative effects of RABL6A knockdown...loss of RB1 in RABL6A depleted cells restored DNA synthesis in NHSCs to control cell levels and dramatically reduced the induction of senescence
details: RB1 loss alone had no effect on proliferation but partially rescued anti-proliferative effects of RABL6A knockdown, restored DNA synthesis to control levels and dramatically reduced senescence induction
